title: TileMap
description: A generic, format-independent tile map. Owns a finite grid of TileLayers and a shared set of TileSets. Tile data is stored in compact chunked arrays — no per-tile heap objects. The map does NOT own tileset textures (those are Loader-owned) and does NOT own SceneNode children — see import('./TileMapNode').TileMapNode, which owns those. Multiple tilesets are supported: each cell stores a packed tileset index and local tile ID, so different tilesets may have different tile dimensions.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Owns a finite grid of TileLayers and a shared set of TileSets. Tile data is stored in compact chunked arrays — no per-tile heap objects.
The map does NOT own tileset textures (those are Loader-owned) and does NOT own SceneNode children — see import('./TileMapNode').TileMapNode, which owns those.
Multiple tilesets are supported: each cell stores a packed tileset index and local tile ID, so different tilesets may have different tile dimensions.

members.name: addLayer
members.description: Add a layer after construction.

members.name: addObjectLayer
members.description: Add an object layer after construction.

members.name: addTileset
members.description: Add a tileset. Tilesets must have unique names.

members.name: clearTileAt
members.signature: clearTileAt(layerId: number, tx: number, ty: number): void
members.description: Clear a tile on a given layer at tile coordinates. Convenience for map.getTileLayerById(id)?.clearTileAt(tx, ty).

members.name: createView
members.description: Create a new TileMapView that groups this map's layers into independently placeable band / layer scene nodes for interleaving application actors between tile layers. Each call returns a fresh, independent view — the map does **not** cache a single global view, so multiple coexisting views of the same map are allowed. The view references this map but never owns it: destroying the view frees only its generated layer/band nodes — never the map, its layers, tileset textures, or any application actors.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Destroy the map and all owned layers and chunk storage. Is idempotent. Does NOT destroy tileset textures (Loader-owned) or any SceneNodes (those do not exist yet in this slice).

members.name: getImageLayer
members.description: Get an image layer by name (first match in insertion order), or undefined.

members.name: getImageLayerById
members.description: Get an image layer by ID.

members.name: getObjectLayer
members.description: Get an object layer by name (first match in insertion order), or undefined. Supply an ObjectSchema type argument S to obtain a typed view of the layer — getObjectLayer<LevelObjects>('Entities') returns an ObjectLayer<LevelObjects> whose ObjectLayer.byType / ObjectLayer.where accessors narrow properties. The schema is a static developer promise only; no runtime validation is performed and the call remains fully back-compatible when omitted.

members.name: getObjectLayerById
members.description: Get an object layer by ID. Supply an ObjectSchema type argument S to obtain a typed view of the layer, as with getObjectLayer.

members.name: getTileAt
members.signature: getTileAt(layerId: number, tx: number, ty: number): ResolvedTile | null
members.description: Get a resolved tile from a given layer at tile coordinates. Convenience for map.getTileLayerById(id)?.getTileAt(tx, ty). Returns null for an empty cell, out-of-bounds, or missing layer.

members.name: getTileLayer
members.description: Get a tile layer by name. Returns the first match in insertion order.

members.name: getTileLayerById
members.description: Get a tile layer by ID.

members.name: getTileset
members.description: Get a tileset by name, or undefined.

members.name: pixelToTile
members.description: Convert a pixel position in map-local space to the tile coordinate that contains it. Uses floor. May return coordinates outside map bounds.

members.name: removeImageLayer
members.description: Remove an image layer by ID.

members.name: removeLayer
members.description: Remove a layer by ID. The layer is destroyed.

members.name: removeObjectLayer
members.description: Remove an object layer by ID.

members.name: setTileAt
members.signature: setTileAt(layerId: number, tx: number, ty: number, tile: ResolvedTile): void
members.description: Set a tile on a given layer at tile coordinates. Convenience for map.getTileLayerById(id)?.setTileAt(tx, ty, tile).

members.name: tileToPixel
members.description: Convert a tile coordinate to the pixel position of its top-left corner in map-local space (ignoring layer offsets).

members.name: backgroundColor
members.description: Map background colour as 0xRRGGBB, or null. Informational.

members.name: chunkHeight
members.description: Default chunk height for layers.

members.name: chunkWidth
members.description: Default chunk width for layers.

members.name: class
members.description: Map class/type string (Tiled class; may be empty).

members.name: height
members.description: Map height in tiles.

members.name: name
members.description: Map name (debug).

members.name: properties
members.description: Map-level properties (immutable).

members.name: renderOrder
members.description: Tile draw order (Tiled renderorder). Informational.

members.name: tileHeight
members.description: Tile height in pixels.

members.name: tileWidth
members.description: Tile width in pixels.

members.name: width
members.description: Map width in tiles.

members.name: destroyed
members.description: Whether the map has been destroyed.

members.name: imageLayers
members.description: Immutable snapshot of image layers (insertion order).

members.name: layers
members.description: Immutable snapshot of layers (ordered).

members.name: objectLayers
members.description: Immutable snapshot of object layers (insertion order).

members.name: pixelHeight
members.description: Pixel height.

members.name: pixelWidth
members.description: Pixel width.

members.name: revision
members.description: Monotonic map revision counter. Increments on structural changes only (add/remove layer, add tileset). Cell mutations are tracked per-chunk and per-layer; the renderer reads chunk-level revisions directly.

members.name: tilesets
members.description: Immutable list of tilesets available to this map.
